questionHtml: Predict how the action spectrum from the white areas of the leaf would differ from the green areas.
markschemeHtml:
it would be a straight line/have no peaks
OR
no photosynthesis ✔

 

Accept a labelled horizontal line in the bottom third of the y-axis.

Do not accept “lower line” or “lower photosynthesis”

meta.title: Predict how the action spectrum from the white areas of the leaf would differ from the green areas.
